case_title: WILLIE WESLEY WELLS VS. MAURICE CARACTER

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS, WILLIE WESLEY AS TO DEFENDANT CARACTER, MAURICE AN INDIVIDUAL DBA AMERICAN EAGLE SECURITY SERVICES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS, WILLIE WESLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARACTER, MAURICE AN INDIVIDUAL DBA AMERICAN EAGLE SECURITY SERVICES $8,258.17 PRINCIPAL, $52.81 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,515.98, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
